---
title: "We welcome 5 new individual members"
date: 2018-08-17
subtitle: "The Open Science Center counts 37 member! We want to introduce our latest members."
categories: ["New Members"]

template: templates/news-template.html
filters:
  - templates/process-news-yaml.lua
---


The number of individual members of the OSC is continuously increasing since its foundation in November 2017 with 17 founding members. With our 5 new members from the University Hospital Munich, the OSC counts 37 members from 11 disciplines.

**_We are happy to introduce our new members, in alphabetical order:_**

![](/people/people/images/belka_claus.jpg){width="30%"}

**[Prof. Dr. Claus Belka](/people/people/claus-belka.qmd)**  
Department of Radiation Oncology  

---

![](/people/people/images/ingrisch_michael.jpg){width="30%"}

**[Dr. Michael Ingrisch](/people/people/michael-ingrisch.qmd)**  
Department of Radiology  

---

![](/people/people/images/perneczky_robert.jpg){width="30%"}

**[Prof. Dr. Robert Perneczky](/people/people/robert-perneczky.qmd)**  
Department of Psychiatry and Psychotherapy  

---

![](/people/people/images/schulz_enrico.jpg){width="30%"}

**[Dr. Enrico Schulz](/people/people/enrico-schulz.qmd)**  
Department of Neurology  

---

![](/people/people/images/strube_wolfgang.jpg){width="30%"}

**[Dr. Wolfgang Strube](/people/people/wolfgang-strube.qmd)**  
Department of Psychiatry and Psychotherapy  

---

Thank you for joining the initiative!
